page_metadata.biotools__summary: The MyHits server integrates several tools with a focus on protein annotation and the analysis of protein domains.  Guest users have access to tools such as ClustalW and T-Coffee and databases like Swiss-Prot, Prosite and Interpro.  Registration allows users to store their results in private databases, and is free for academic users.
